title: EXTRASTAR 18W LED Ceiling Light with Infrared Motion Sensor, 1440 Lumen Round Surface Mounted LED Panel Ceiling Lamp, IP65 Waterproof for Outdoor & Indoor Use - 6500K Daylight
features: Motion Sensor Light: Our LED ceiling light adopts advanced PIR infrared motion detector and dusk to dawn sensor, IC and SMD technology, which can instantly turn on when it detects motion up to 8M(26ft) away under dark ambient with a 30 sec. delay after a period of inactivity.

Energy Saving: 18W LED ceiling light is equivalent to the traditional 144W incandescent bulb, and the extremely long service life can reach up to 25,000 hours, which enable to help you effectively save more than 80% of electricity costs.

High Quality: LED Panel Ceiling lamp adopt high quality 2835 led SMD chips, which provide with 1440Lm brilliant cold light, much brighter than most of other ceiling lights in this size. Made of PVC and Acrylic board, it’s durable and reliable for a long term use.

Wide Application: Provide with a uniform and glare-free light without flicker, protecting your eyes from glare lighting. Ideal for hallways, bedrooms, offices, stairways, and much more commercial or residential, you can install this led ceiling lights where the place you need more light.

What You Get: Our 18W LED ceiling light with PIR infrared motion Sensor and our friendly customer service. Any questions about the item, please feel free to contact us at any time and we will reply in 24 hours.
description: This LED ceiling light adopts advanced PIR infrared motion detector, IC and SMD technology to detect motion up to 8M (26 ft) away and turn on immediately to provide uniform, non-glare, flicker-free light.18W is equal to 144W and provides 1440LM brilliant cold light, service life up to 25,000 hours.Ideal for hallways, bedrooms, offices, staircases, and more commercial or residential.
